title: Check Current AGV System Status Using the RMS Page
summary: Use the RMS page to remotely access the "Overall System AGV Status" view and review the current system status information shown there. This source supports only locating and viewing the status page, not interpreting specific indicators or taking corrective action.
when_to_use: Use when remote support needs to view the current AGV or system status through the RMS page and confirm that the "Overall System AGV Status" page is available.
not_for: Do not use this procedure to interpret specific status meanings when the source does not define them.
Do not use this procedure to perform corrective actions or AGV fault recovery.
Do not use this procedure to infer navigation details, field meanings, or controls not shown in the source.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Remotely access the RMS page, locate the Overall System AGV Status page, and review the current status information displayed.

safety_notes: This source supports remote status viewing only.
Do not infer specific status meanings or corrective actions because they are not provided in this source segment.
access_or_tools_needed: Remote access to the relevant interface

access_required: Remote access to the RMS interface
system_preconditions: The RMS page must be accessible remotely.
The Overall System AGV Status page must be available from the remote interface.

visual_references.description: Training video frame showing the "Overall System AGV Status" page reference and the instruction to go to the RMS page for remote availability.

steps.title: Open or navigate to the RMS page
steps.purpose: Access the remote interface referenced by the training segment for viewing system status.
steps.instruction: Open or navigate to the RMS page referenced in the training segment for remote availability.
steps.expected_result: The RMS page is accessible remotely.
steps.healthy_condition: The RMS page opens and is available for review.
steps.failure_condition: The RMS page is not accessible remotely.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Reference to remote availability and the instruction to go to the RMS page.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the RMS page is not accessible remotely.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Transcript: "But is that, is this remotely available? Yeah, yeah... hey, go to RMS page."

steps.title: Locate the Overall System AGV Status page

steps.expected_result: The page titled "Overall System AGV Status" is visible.
steps.healthy_condition: The displayed page title matches "Overall System AGV Status."
steps.failure_condition: The Overall System AGV Status page cannot be located from the available remote interface.

actions.label: Identify page title
actions.exact_action: Locate the page titled "Overall System AGV Status."

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the Overall System AGV Status page cannot be located from the available remote interface.

steps.title: Confirm the page shows current system status
steps.purpose: Verify that the correct page has been opened for status review.
steps.instruction: Verify that the displayed page is the one described as showing the current status of the system.
steps.expected_result: The page is confirmed as the current system status view.
steps.healthy_condition: The page matches the source description that it shows the current status of the system.
steps.failure_condition: The displayed page does not match the source description of the current system status page.

actions.label: Verify page purpose
actions.exact_action: Verify that the displayed page is the one described as showing the current status of the system.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the displayed page cannot be confirmed as the current system status page.

steps.title: Review the displayed status information
steps.purpose: Observe the current AGV or system status information available on the page.
steps.instruction: Review the current status information shown on the Overall System AGV Status page using only the values and indicators presented on that page.
steps.expected_result: The current AGV or system status is visible for remote review.
steps.healthy_condition: Status information is displayed on the Overall System AGV Status page and can be viewed remotely.
steps.failure_condition: Status information is not visible, cannot be reviewed, or would require unsupported interpretation.

actions.label: Review status display
actions.exact_action: Review the current status information shown on the Overall System AGV Status page using only the values and indicators presented on that page.

success_criteria: The RMS page is accessed remotely.
The "Overall System AGV Status" page is located.
The page is confirmed as the current system status view.
Current AGV or system status information is visible for review.
healthy_conditions: Remote access to the RMS page is available.
The page title "Overall System AGV Status" is visible.
The page shows current system status information.
failure_conditions: The RMS page is not accessible remotely.
The Overall System AGV Status page cannot be located.
The displayed page cannot be confirmed as the current system status page.
Status information is not visible or requires unsupported interpretation.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if the RMS page is not accessible remotely.
Escalate if the Overall System AGV Status page cannot be located from the available remote interface.
